title: Festive Crumbly Thai Tapioca Crumble
description: A rich and crumbly festive dish featuring scallions, cooked with a tadka seasoning for a delightful savory flavor profile, suitable for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: Tadka seasoning
ingredients.notes: For a savory dash of flavor and aroma

instructions: Rinse the tapioca pearls under cold water to remove any dust. Place them in a large pot with 3 cups of water.
Add 1/2 teaspoon salt and bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat to low. Simmer gently for about 45 minutes or until the tapioca pearls are translucent and fully cooked.
Drain well, reserving 1/2 cup of the cooking liquid if needed later, and set aside the pearls.
In a skillet, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add finely chopped scallions and a tadka seasoning to sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add drained tapioca pearls into the skillet with scallions and toss well to coat evenly. If necessary, add reserved cooking liquid to reach your desired consistency.
Garnish with fresh scallions before serving. Enjoy a rich and crumbly festive Thai dish that's both savory and comforting.
